'''thovapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabertoothed|sabertoothed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-v-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabertoothed|sabertoothed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thovapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thovapithi|thovapithi]] || [[word:thovapiji|thovapiji]] || [[word:thovapishi|thovapishi]] || [[word:thovapiki|thovapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thovaputhuthu|thovaputhuthu]] || [[word:thovapujuju|thovapujuju]] || [[word:thovapushushu|thovapushushu]] || [[word:thovapukuku|thovapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovaputhu|thovaputhu]] || [[word:thovapuju|thovapuju]] || [[word:thovapushu|thovapushu]] || [[word:thovapuku|thovapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovapufthuf|thovapufthuf]] || [[word:thovapufjuf|thovapufjuf]] || [[word:thovapufshuf|thovapufshuf]] || [[word:thovapufkuf|thovapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thovapethe|thovapethe]] || [[word:thovapeje|thovapeje]] || [[word:thovapeshe|thovapeshe]] || [[word:thovapeke|thovapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thovapothotho|thovapothotho]] || [[word:thovapojojo|thovapojojo]] || [[word:thovaposhosho|thovaposhosho]] || [[word:thovapokoko|thovapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovapotho|thovapotho]] || [[word:thovapojo|thovapojo]] || [[word:thovaposho|thovaposho]] || [[word:thovapoko|thovapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovapofthof|thovapofthof]] || [[word:thovapofjof|thovapofjof]] || [[word:thovapofshof|thovapofshof]] || [[word:thovapofkof|thovapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thovapïfthïf|thovapïfthïf]] || [[word:thovapïfjïf|thovapïfjïf]] || [[word:thovapïfshïf|thovapïfshïf]] || [[word:thovapïfkïf|thovapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thovapïfthïfthïf|thovapïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:thovapïfjïfjïf|thovapïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:thovapïfshïfshïf|thovapïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:thovapïfkïfkïf|thovapïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovapïfthïf|thovapïfthïf]] || [[word:thovapïfjïf|thovapïfjïf]] || [[word:thovapïfshïf|thovapïfshïf]] || [[word:thovapïfkïf|thovapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovapïfthïf|thovapïfthïf]] || [[word:thovapïfjïf|thovapïfjïf]] || [[word:thovapïfshïf|thovapïfshïf]] || [[word:thovapïfkïf|thovapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thovapæthæ|thovapæthæ]] || [[word:thovapæjæ|thovapæjæ]] || [[word:thovapæshæ|thovapæshæ]] || [[word:thovapækæ|thovapækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thovapathatha|thovapathatha]] || [[word:thovapajaja|thovapajaja]] || [[word:thovapashasha|thovapashasha]] || [[word:thovapakaka|thovapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovapatha|thovapatha]] || [[word:thovapaja|thovapaja]] || [[word:thovapasha|thovapasha]] || [[word:thovapaka|thovapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovapafthaf|thovapafthaf]] || [[word:thovapafjaf|thovapafjaf]] || [[word:thovapafshaf|thovapafshaf]] || [[word:thovapafkaf|thovapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thovapasha|thovapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thovapshësha|thovapshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thovaprosha|thovaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thovapmusha|thovapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thovapyasha|thovapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothovapnkshësha|gothovapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothovapnkrosha|gothovapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothovapnkmusha|gothovapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothovapnkyasha|gothovapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thovavapasha|thovavapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thovavapshësha|thovavapshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thovavaprosha|thovavaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thovavapmusha|thovavapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thovavapyasha|thovavapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothovavapnkshësha|gothovavapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothovavapnkrosha|gothovavapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothovavapnkmusha|gothovavapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothovavapnkyasha|gothovavapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thevæpasha|thevæpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thevæpshësha|thevæpshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thevæprosha|thevæprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thevæpmusha|thevæpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thevæpyasha|thevæpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothevæpnkshësha|gothevæpnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothevæpnkrosha|gothevæpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothevæpnkmusha|gothevæpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothevæpnkyasha|gothevæpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thovfapasha|thovfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thovfapshësha|thovfapshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thovfaprosha|thovfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thovfapmusha|thovfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thovfapyasha|thovfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothovfapnkshësha|gothovfapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothovfapnkrosha|gothovfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothovfapnkmusha|gothovfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothovfapnkyasha|gothovfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
